claude-ai-login.description: Scoped capability for the embedded claude.ai login webview. Grants notification:default because tauri-plugin-notification injects a window.Notification polyfill into every webview, and claude.ai's own page code reads Notification.permission during init; without this permission the polyfill's IPC call is rejected by ACL, the promise escapes uncaught, and the claude.ai bundle halts mid-render leaving a blank window. The remote.urls list is required — without it, Tauri marks the capability local-only and silently skips applying it to webviews loaded from external origins like claude.ai, so the ACL check runs as though no capability existed at all. URLs cover claude.ai itself plus every OAuth provider the login flow may navigate to (Google, Apple), since the polyfill's init script runs at document-start on each navigation and triggers the permission check on those pages too.
